retry_reason: refcount_dec always executes unconditionally and has no failure return. Retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: Release (put) wrapper for struct inet6_ifaddr: decrements the object's reference count via refcount_dec. The caller must ensure that the ifp is valid and must not access the object after this call if the caller held the last reference. This call does not return a success/failure indication; the caller is responsible for proper pairing with previous get references. Typically used to drop a reference acquired by in6_ifa_get or similar.
